name: Polaris Acacia Wood Rectangle Bar Table Dark Gray - Christopher Knight Home: Weather-Resistant Patio Furniture, 2-Seater
description:
Enliven your summer experience with an outdoor bar table that encourages evening cocktail parties and lively afternoon conversations. The minimalistic yet refined structure strikes a refined ambiance that is emphasized with its elegant acacia wood make. Crafted with clean lines and gracefully tapered legs, this bar table will anchor your dining area in an inviting style that is perfect for small patios or backyard spaces. This table will blend seamlessly into any arrangement, making this the perfect outdoor piece for your home.

MINIMALISTIC DESIGN: Featuring a rectangular silhouette and a neatly slatted table top, our bar table offers an natural look that showcases its smooth design. Finished with slim, tapered legs, our table offers a simplistic yet exquisite style.

ACACIA WOOD WITH COMPLEMENTING FINISH: Made with acacia wood that brings a sleek and exotic look to your space, this durable hardwood naturally withstands outdoor elements and will not darken over time. Finished with a complementing wash, acacia wood is perfect as a solid, heavy frame that resists wear and tear.

EASY TO MAINTAIN: This table is naturally weather-resistant to most elements and its lifespan can be extended by covering or storing when not in use.

BAR HEIGHT: This table has a height of 40.00 inches, making this perfect addition to any kitchen or dining room.

ASSEMBLY REQUIRED: Some assembly is required for this table. All of the instructions and tools needed for assembly are included. Please note that chairs are not included with this piece.
